case_title: KWOON-HUNG TANG et al VS. RONNIE BIMBO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, KWOON-HUNG

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, KWOON-HUNG TANG, MAN-FAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIMBO, RONNIE NICHOLAS, TAMMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANTS VACATED ON 3/13/07, $18,553.29 RENT, $366.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,919.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, KWOON-HUNG TANG, MAN-FAI AS TO DEFENDANT BIMBO, RONNIE NICHOLAS, TAMMY DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
